sql_array: CREATE TABLE network_data (ip inet, value numeric);
CREATE TABLE additional_data (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, ip inet, category varchar(50));

SELECT A.ip, AVG(A.value) OVER (PARTITION BY A.category) AS avg_value FROM (SELECT ND.ip, AD.category, ND.value FROM network_data ND JOIN additional_data AD ON ND.ip >> AD.ip WHERE ND.value IS NOT NULL) A GROUP BY A.ip, A.category;

SELECT A.ip, A.avg_value FROM (SELECT ND.ip, AVG(ND.value) AS avg_value FROM network_data ND WHERE ND.value IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ND.ip) A WHERE A.avg_value > (SELECT AVG(ND.value) FROM network_data ND WHERE ND.value IS NOT NULL);
SELECT A.ip, AVG(A.value) OVER () AS overall_avg FROM (SELECT ND.ip, AD.category, ND.value FROM network_data ND JOIN additional_data AD ON ND.ip >> AD.ip) A HAVING overall_avg IS NOT NULL;
SELECT ND.ip, AVG(ND.value) FROM network_data ND WHERE ND.value IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ND.ip HAVING ND.ip >> inet '192.168.1.0/24';
SELECT * FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ND.ip, AVG(ND.value) AS avg_value FROM network_data ND WHERE ND.value > 0 GROUP BY ND.ip HAVING ND.ip >> inet '192.168.1.0/24') AS Sub WHERE avg_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT A.ip, AVG(COALESCE(A.value, 0)) FROM (SELECT ND.ip, ND.value FROM network_data ND WHERE ND.value IS NOT NULL) A GROUP BY A.ip HAVING A.ip >> inet '192.168.1.0/24';
ALTER TABLE additional_data ADD COLUMN value numeric DEFAULT 0;
UPDATE additional_data SET value = (SELECT AVG(ND.value) FROM network_data ND WHERE ND.ip >> additional_data.ip) WHERE value IS NULL;
